mp_001: Depiction of Christ as Savior of the World, holding a crystal orb. One of fewer than 20 known paintings by Leonardo. Most expensive painting ever sold at auction.
mp_002: Reclining female nude, one of Modigliani's celebrated series that caused scandal when first exhibited in 1917. Known as 'Red Nude' for its warm terracotta background.
mp_003: Iconic image of existential anxiety. Figure with agonized expression against tumultuous sky. One of four versions by Munch (two paintings, two pastels). The 1895 pastel is the most colorful version and the only one in private hands.
mp_004: Portrait of Dr. Paul Gachet, the physician who cared for Van Gogh in his final months at Auvers-sur-Oise. Painted June 1890, one month before the artist's death. First version of two.
mp_005: Quintessential Impressionist scene of Parisian open-air dance at Moulin de la Galette in Montmartre. This is the smaller of two versions Renoir painted.
ai_001: Portrait of Alan Turing created by Ai-Da, a humanoid robot artist. Ai-Da uses cameras in its eyes and AI algorithms to create sketches, then paints with robotic arms. 15 versions painted on small canvases, 3 selected and digitally composited with a Bombe machine painting.
ai_002: AI-generated portrait created by a GAN trained on 15,000 historical portraits from the 14th-20th centuries. Signed with the GAN loss function formula. First AI-generated artwork sold at a major auction house.
ai_003: AI-generated visual art created using DCGAN, PGAN, and StyleGAN algorithms trained on NASA ISS photograph archives. Part of Anadol's ongoing 'Machine Hallucinations' series. Top lot in Christie's first all-AI art auction (total sale: $728,784).
ai_004: Created using a custom text-to-image AI model trained on altered portraits of Holly Herndon. Explores themes of identity, consent, and AI training data ethics.
ai_005: Autonomous AI installation that endlessly generates unique portraits of non-existent people using a custom GAN trained on thousands of 17th-19th century portraits. Runs as a self-contained system in an antique wooden cabinet with two screens.
rc_001: Full-length portrait of Elisabeth Lederer, wife of industrialist August Lederer, one of Klimt's most important patrons. Most expensive work of modern art at auction; 2nd most expensive artwork ever at auction.
rc_002: Square landscape painted during Klimt's summer retreat to Lake Attersee, Austria. Dense carpet of wildflowers in pointillist-influenced style. One of Klimt's celebrated Attersee landscapes.
rc_003: Still life of stacked yellow-covered French paperback novels on a table with roses in a glass. One of only nine book still lifes Van Gogh ever painted, and one of only two remaining in private hands. Reflects his lifelong passion for literature.
rc_004: Classic Color Field painting from Rothko's golden period. Stacked luminous rectangles with a yellow stripe. Sold after a nearly 5-minute bidding war, 24% above its $50M low estimate.
rc_005: Self-portrait showing Kahlo asleep in a wooden four-poster bed floating among clouds, wrapped in vines, while a papier-mache skeleton (Judas figure) wired with dynamite sticks lies on the canopy above her. Most expensive work by a woman artist at auction; most expensive Latin American artwork at auction.
ct_001: Monumental portrait of Nara's signature doe-eyed girl, hiding a knife behind her back. Full-body figure against a luminous pearly ground. Set Nara's auction record and made him the most expensive Japanese artist at auction.
ct_002: Large-scale chaotic interior scene depicting figures mid-pie-fight, with expressionist distortion and heavy impasto technique. Part of Ghenie's celebrated 'Pie Fight' series. Signed and dated 'Ghenie 2014' on reverse.
ct_003: Dense, layered abstraction combining architectural drawing, gestural painting, and cartographic elements. Set the record for the most expensive work by an African-born artist at auction.
ct_004: Domestic interior scene blending Nigerian and American visual culture through photo-transfer collage and painting. Part of a series exploring postcolonial identity and cross-cultural experience. Signed 'Akunyili 2012'.
ct_005: Square canvas featuring Condo's signature 'artificial realism' - grotesque, psychologically charged portraits that merge Old Master technique with cartoon-like distortion. Set the artist's auction record at the time.
